heading: Inappropriate use of chapter
label: 4011 Inappropriate use of chapter
text: If a court determines, in any proceeding to enforce a civil right, that any interest, property, or contract has been transferred or acquired with the intent to delay the just enforcement of such right by taking advantage of this chapter, the court shall enter such judgment or make such order as might lawfully be entered or made concerning such transfer or acquisition.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 581 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
